title: M.Phil / Ph.D Jobs 2026 – Assistant Professor
shortInfo: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Assistant Professor. Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CUSAT official website.

basic_details.job_title: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Cochin University of Science and Technology
basic_details.short_information: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Assistant Professor. Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CUSAT official website.

application_fee.details: For Ph.D holder - ₹ 42,000/- Per Month For other contract teachers - ₹40,000/- Per Month

age_limit.maximum_age: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the CUSAT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: B. E. / B. Tech. / B. S. in Polymer Science and Engineering and M. E. / M. Tech. / M. S. or Integrated M. Tech in Polymer Technology with First Class or equivalent in any one of the degrees., Ph.D (Desirable)
qualification.details: B. E. / B. Tech. / B. S. in Polymer Science and Engineering and M. E. / M. Tech. / M. S. or Integrated M. Tech in Polymer Technology with First Class or equivalent in any one of the degrees. Ph.D is desirable.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUSAT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the CUSAT Assistant Professor (on Contract basis) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the CUSAT Assistant Professor (on Contract basis) recruitment is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant Professor (on Contract basis) at CUSAT?
faq.answer: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Assistant Professor (on Contract basis) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech./B.S. in Polymer Science and Engineering and an M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or Integrated M.Tech in Polymer Technology with First Class or equivalent in any one of the degrees. A Ph.D. is desirable.

faq.question: What is the application fee for the CUSAT Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹950, while for SC/ST candidates, it is ₹195. This fee is payable online during the application process.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor (on Contract basis) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Professor (on Contract basis) position ranges from ₹40,000 to ₹42,000 per month. Ph.D. holders will receive ₹42,000, while others will receive ₹40,000.

faq.question: How can I apply for the CUSAT Assistant Professor (on Contract basis) recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official CUSAT recruitment portal. The application process involves filling out the form, uploading documents, and paying the application fee before the last date.

faq.question: Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any age-related information or relaxations.

faq.question: What is the job type for this Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The Assistant Professor position at CUSAT is on a contract basis, meaning the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the university's terms and conditions.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the comprehensive details regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: What is the location of CUSAT?
faq.answer: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) is located in Kochi, Kerala, with the pincode 682022.
